nasb.text: For behold, the Lord will come in fire And His chariots like the whirlwind, To render His anger with fury, And His rebuke with flames of fire.

esv.text: “For behold, the Lord will come in fire, and his chariots like the whirlwind, to render his anger in fury, and his rebuke with flames of fire.

cnv.text: 看哪！耶和華必在火中降臨， 他的戰車好像旋風； 他要以猛烈的怒氣施行報應， 用火燄施行斥責。

ccb.text: 看啊，耶和华要在火中降临， 祂的战车好像旋风。 祂要发烈怒，用火焰惩罚。

csbs.text: 看哪！耶和华必在烈火中临到， 他的战车好像旋风， 为要在怒火中施行他愤怒的报应， 在火焰中发出他的斥责；
